Scenario.ScriptSettings: { "AISeed": 0, "AllyView": true, "CircularMap": true, "Description": "Wave Defense - Prevent the Gohma from swarming out of Misery Mire for as long as you can!", "Keywords": [ "trigger" ], "LockTeams": true, "Name": "Edge of Misery", "PlayerData": [ "", "", "", { "Civ": "gohma" } ], "Preview": "", "RevealMap": false, "VictoryConditions": [ "conquest" ] }
